title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Ambuja Cements Capital India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Ambuja Cements Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Ambuja Cements Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Ambuja Cements Capital India:
Ambuja Cements Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements Capital India!
